title: UK Designates Al-Mansoori Over Terror-Finance Concerns
body: The United Kingdom's HM Treasury today added Hassan Al-Mansoori and his flagship trade-finance firm, Mansoori Trading Co, to the UK consolidated sanctions list under counter-terrorism authorities. Officials cited concerns over the channelling of trade-finance flows. Al-Mansoori's cousin, Karim Hassan, currently serves as a director of Gulf Trading Ltd, a separate UAE entity. UK officials emphasised that Gulf Trading is not itself sanctioned but cautioned counterparties to perform enhanced due diligence.
